idea-plugin.name: Nord Recharged
idea-plugin.description:
Nord Recharged - Beautiful Arctic-inspired Themes for IntelliJ

Four carefully crafted themes combining the elegance of the Nord color palette with modern UI design. Perfect for developers who love clean, minimal aesthetics with optimal readability.

What's Included:

  • Nord Recharged Dark - Pure Nord dark theme with Polar Night backgrounds
  • Nord Recharged Light - Clean light variant perfect for bright environments
  • OneNord Dark Recharged - One Dark style with Nord colors (purple keywords, yellow classes)
  • OneNord Light Recharged - One Light style with vibrant Nord palette

Key Features:

  • 100% Official Palettes: Authentic Nord colors + OneNord colors by @rmehri01
  • Islands UI Support: Fully optimized for JetBrains' modern UI
  • Enhanced Readability: Keywords in bold, comments in italic
  • 50+ Java Attributes: Comprehensive syntax highlighting
  • Multi-Language: Java, Kotlin, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, and more
  • Eye-Friendly: Optimized contrast for long coding sessions
  • Subtle Accents: Blue-tinted headers for visual identity

Perfect For:

  • Nord theme enthusiasts
  • Developers migrating from VS Code or Atom
  • Anyone seeking elegant, minimal themes
  • Projects requiring extended focus time

Installation:

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Restart your IDE
  3. Go to Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance → Theme
  4. Select your preferred Nord Recharged theme

Color Philosophy:

Nord Recharged: Minimalist with subtle blue accents, cyan selections
OneNord Recharged: More colorful with purple keywords, yellow classes, red variables

Links:

  • GitHub Repository
  • Report Issues
  • Nord Color Palette

Inspired by Nord JetBrains and OneNord JetBrains themes. Created with care for the community.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.0 - Initial Release (2026-07-20)

Themes Added:

  • Nord Recharged Dark & Light - Pure Nord palette with minimal aesthetic
  • OneNord Dark & Light Recharged - One Dark/Light style with Nord colors

Features:

  • 100% official Nord and OneNord color palettes
  • Full Islands UI support (IntelliJ 2023.3+)
  • 50+ Java syntax attributes with optimized colors
  • Keywords in bold, comments in italic for better readability
  • Cyan tree selections (#88C0D0) for better highlighting
  • Subtle blue accent on ToolWindow headers
  • Custom popup backgrounds for better separation
  • Improved scrollbar contrast
  • Multi-language support (Java, Kotlin, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.)

Highlights:

  • Nord Recharged: Minimalist with blue keywords, cyan accents
  • OneNord Recharged: Vibrant with purple keywords, yellow classes, red variables

Compatibility:

  • IntelliJ IDEA 2023.3 - 2024.3 (build 233 - 243)
  • All JetBrains IDEs (PyCharm, WebStorm, PhpStorm, etc.)
